intro: We would love for you to join us on our special day.
card_venue_desc: Find information on how to get to the wedding venue at De Floriana, Molinaseca.
card_tourism_title: What to do in the area
card_tourism_desc: Discover places to visit, trails, gastronomy, and activities in El Bierzo.
card_accommodation_desc: Check accommodation options in Molinaseca and nearby areas.
rsvp_desc: Please confirm your attendance before May 15, 2026.
venue_title: How to get to the wedding venue
venue_h1: How to get to the wedding venue
venue_directions: The wedding venue is located at the entrance of Molinaseca. You will find it on the right-hand side coming from the Ponferrada road.
venue_by_car_desc: Molinaseca is 7 km from Ponferrada. You can easily reach it via the LE-142 road.
venue_tip: 💡 Tip: There is public transportation to Ponferrada, but we recommend renting a car for convenience during your stay.
venue_parking_desc: Floriana does not have its own parking, but there is a free public car park just across the road (on the left side coming from Ponferrada).
venue_parking_warning: ⚠️ Warning: July is high season in Spain, especially along the Camino de Santiago route. Parking may be busier than usual. We recommend arriving a little early.
tourism_title: What to do in the area
tourism_h1: What to do in the area
tourism_intro: Molinaseca and its surroundings offer a perfect mix of history, nature, and gastronomy. Take advantage of your visit to discover this beautiful region of El Bierzo.
tourism_cherries_heading: 🍒 Cherry Picking with Fermín and David
tourism_cherries_desc: If you want to experience a typical bercian activity, come and pick cherries with expert cherry pickers. If you're interested, let us know!
tourism_templaria_desc: Ponferrada goes Templar once more. From July 2nd to 5th, its streets are filled with a medieval and festive atmosphere that recalls the town's past and its ties to the Order of the Temple.
tourism_place1_desc: Imposing 12th-century fortress in Ponferrada. A jewel of medieval architecture.
tourism_place2_desc: UNESCO World Heritage Site. Ancient Roman mines with spectacular reddish-toned landscapes.
tourism_place3_desc: Charming village on the Camino de Santiago. Roman bridge, cobbled streets, and traditional architecture.
tourism_place4_desc: El Bierzo has numerous trails for all levels, through mountains, rivers, and vineyards.
tourism_place5_desc: Visit local wineries and taste the excellent wines of the D.O. Bierzo, especially Mencía.
tourism_place6_desc: Villafranca del Bierzo, Cacabelos, Carracedelo... each with its own unique history and beauty.
tourism_gastronomy_intro: El Bierzo is famous for its traditional cuisine and wines. Don't miss:
tourism_botillo_intro: Botillo is a cured sausage exclusive to the El Bierzo region, with Protected Geographical Indication. It is made from ribs, tail, and other pork cuts, seasoned and smoked. A unique flavour you won't find anywhere else.
tourism_food3_desc: Pulpo á feira (Galician-style octopus) and many other Galician dishes are widely found in El Bierzo, thanks to the strong Galician influence in the region.
tourism_food4_desc: Patatas Bravas, Calamari, Pork Rinds, Mussels
accommodation_notice: Book in advance. During those dates, the Templar Night festivity takes place in Ponferrada and the Camino de Santiago passes through Molinaseca, so there may be many pilgrims and visitors.
accommodation_nomad_desc: The wedding venue offers accommodation at Hotel Nomad. A very convenient option if you want to enjoy the celebration without worrying about transportation.
accommodation_nomad_attention: ⚠️ Attention: Rooms are blocked by default for wedding guests. If you are interested in staying at the hotel, contact us directly and we will manage the booking for you, giving priority to guests travelling from far away.
accommodation_other_intro: Molinaseca is a beautiful touristic village with various accommodation options for all tastes and budgets.
accommodation_hotels_desc: Several hotel options in Molinaseca and Ponferrada, from boutique hotels to budget-friendly choices.
accommodation_airbnb_desc: Apartments and entire homes ideal for groups or families who want more space and independence.
accommodation_rural_desc: Charming accommodations in natural settings. Perfect for an authentic Bierzo experience.
accommodation_tip: 💡 Tip: Search for accommodation on platforms like Booking.com, Airbnb, or rural tourism portals. The sooner you book, the more options you'll have available.
